parameters.subject: =Dependency cleared for Task {{$json.dependent_task_title}}
parameters.html:
=Hello,

The dependency task “{{$json.dependency_task_title}}” has been completed.

You can now proceed with your task:
“{{$json.dependent_task_title}}”

Dependency cleared on: {{$json.dependency_completed_at}}

Regards,
PMS System

parameters.query:
WITH latest_task_status AS (
  SELECT
    tsl.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY tsl.task_management_id
      ORDER BY tsl.created_at DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM task_status_logs tsl
  WHERE tsl.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 60 MINUTE
)

SELECT
  lts.task_management_id            AS dependency_task_id,
  dep_tm.title                      AS dependency_task_title,

  td.task_id                        AS dependent_task_id,
  dep_on_tm.title                   AS dependent_task_title,

  owner.email                       AS dependent_task_owner_email,

  lts.created_at                    AS dependency_completed_at

FROM latest_task_status lts

-- ONLY completed dependency tasks
JOIN task_dependencies td
  ON td.dependent_task_id = lts.task_management_id
  AND td.active = 1

-- dependency task
JOIN task_managements dep_tm
  ON dep_tm.id = td.dependent_task_id

-- dependent task (blocked task)
JOIN task_managements dep_on_tm
  ON dep_on_tm.id = td.task_id

-- dependent task owner
JOIN spree_users owner
  ON owner.id = dep_on_tm.responsible_person_id

WHERE
  lts.rn = 1
  AND lts.status = 'completed';

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database
